name: research-platform
description: Local company research plugin with a company-analysis skill and Research Job MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Company research workflow and Research Job MCP
interface.longDescription: Adds a company-research skill for grounded operating analysis and a Research Job MCP server that can create jobs, poll status, fetch reports, and search citations from the local deep research platform.
defaultPrompt: Use company research workflow on NVIDIA
Create and inspect a research job report
Search citations for a company finding
